data.body:
G3 child-coverage audit (parent f89d-e54d-203d-4ee0 × THIS child 59ef "Verified fake: contract tests run against BOTH real and fake AcliClient"), 4-bucket per parent criterion, cross-checked against the WHOLE sibling roster (2359/33d0/59ef/822a/8937/fe57). VERDICT: clean pairing — no G3 coverage finding attributable to this child; no uncovered parent criterion remains across the roster.

OWNED / CONTRIBUTED by THIS child (59ef = the verified-fake honesty check: a parametrized dual-run shape-contract harness for the AcliClient enrichment surface — get_comment_map / get_issuelinks_map / get_parent_map / search_issues — asserting RETURN SHAPE keys + JSON primitive types against BOTH the always-on FakeAcliClient and the live-gated real AcliClient, so the fake FAILS the contract if its return shape diverges from the real client's):
- Parent SC "Producer (fetcher + enrichment) and consumers (differs/appliers) cannot drift on snapshot shape without a test failing" → 59ef CONTRIBUTES the FIDELITY half: the snapshot the whole contract chain rests on is built by fetcher.fetch_snapshot from these four enrichment-method return shapes; 59ef pins those return shapes against the real client (dual-run) so the FakeAcliClient (story A) cannot silently drift to a fictional shape and reintroduce the bug-0ee6 failure mode (tests passing against shapes the real client never emits). Complementary to fe57 (honest fixtures/fake foundation; 59ef depends_on fe57) and 8937 (schema SSOT + producer→consumer round-trip). CONTRIBUTED.
- Parent SC "New tests assert behavior/contract (semantic round-trip, structure/type); the suite stays lean; zero change-detector tests added" → 59ef AC3 (assertions check structure/type — keys + JSON primitive types — not exact values, explicitly anti-change-detector) + AC4 (live run is opt-in, does not flake or slow the default suite — lean). CONTRIBUTED.
- Parent AC "All six child stories are closed; the full reconciler suite is green" → 59ef closing + its hermetic dual-run staying green contributes to the structural/aggregate roll-up.

DELEGATION — parent criteria this child does NOT own are correctly assigned to named siblings; 59ef's declared OUT items (capturing the fixtures → story A/fe57; the snapshot round-trip → story B/8937) are consistent with the roster:
- AC "A single-source-of-truth snapshot-entry schema module exists as the canonical shape" + AC "A test validates the fetcher's snapshot output against that schema" + AC "A test validates each differ's snapshot reads against that schema" + AC "One round-trip contract test exercises fetcher → snapshot → differs → applier through the production path, using fixtures derived from real Jira payloads" → 8937 (AC1/AC2/AC3) + fe57 (real-payload fixtures + FakeAcliClient foundation that 59ef VERIFIES).
- AC "Outbound application is collapsed to a single production path (no parallel applier remains)" + AC "The retired outbound applier path is deleted" + SC "Outbound sync is exercised through the production code path, not a parallel dead path" → 33d0.
- AC "Outbound sub-op telemetry (links_applied/comments_applied/labels_applied) is surfaced in the structured batch outcome" + AC "A `computed > 0 && applied == 0` sub-op condition fails loudly, after the warn-first rollout" + SC "A silent sub-op no-op fails a test/canary instead of passing green" → 2359.
- AC "Bidirectional comment/link/parent round-trip is asserted hermetically through the production path" + AC "Every probe assertion that encodes a current bug as expected is converted to fail-when-the-gap-closes" + SC "Bidirectional round-trips … are asserted; no probe encodes a bug as expected" → 822a.
- AC "A documented anti-change-detector guardrail for reconciler tests is committed and referenced by new tests (owned by story B)" → 8937 (story B). The parent AC NAMES its owner verbatim ("owned by story B"); 8937's description ("Owns the epic's guardrail artifact … commit a documented anti-change-detector guardrail … a short docs/ note (ADR-style) … New tests reference it") + 8937 AC5 deliver it (file_impact docs/adr/0004-reconciler-snapshot-contract.md). Under the G3 ANTI-FP rule (a criterion covered-by-definition by a NAMED consumer counts) this is FULLY covered.

ANTI-FP / WITHDRAWAL: the recurring "Parent AC6 documented anti-change-detector guardrail only PARTIALLY covered — no sibling produces a governing artifact / governs new tests" finding raised in early roster audits is a FALSE POSITIVE and stays WITHDRAWN. It was raised against a paraphrased "governs new tests" wording that does not match the plan text; the actual parent AC explicitly names story B (= 8937) as owner and is delivered by 8937's description + AC5. The same false positive was already withdrawn across siblings 2359/33d0/822a/8937/fe57; not re-filed here.

4-bucket summary for this pairing:
- CONTRIBUTED (this child's owned share): parent SC "producer/consumers cannot drift on snapshot shape" (verified-fake fidelity / honest-input half); parent SC "semantic structure/type assertions, lean suite, zero change-detector" (59ef AC3/AC4).
- COVERED-BY-NAMED-SIBLING: SSOT schema + fetcher/differ validation + round-trip contract (8937); real-payload fixtures + FakeAcliClient foundation (fe57); applier collapse + retired-path deletion + production-path exercise (33d0); sub-op telemetry + silent-no-op canary (2359); hermetic bidirectional round-trip + probe de-encoding (822a); documented anti-change-detector guardrail (8937 = story B, named owner).
- STRUCTURAL/AGGREGATE: parent AC "All six child stories are closed; the full reconciler suite is green."
- PARTIALLY / UNCOVERED: none.

No G3 coverage finding for this pairing. 59ef's owned share (the dual-run real-vs-fake shape-contract harness over the enrichment surface, with the fake failing the contract on return-shape divergence and the live run opt-in) is coherent and fully delivered; it keeps the fake fe57 builds honest. The union of children covers every parent acceptance/success criterion, and no parent criterion is left uncovered by, or solely-and-uncovered on account of, this child.
